---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or architectural upgrade for DishaOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, discussion'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve or add to the cognitive loop, agents, or defense mesh.

## 🤔 Why is this needed?

Explain the specific use case and why the current capabilities are insufficient.

## 🏗️ Proposed Architecture

If you have a technical solution in mind, briefly describe how it fits into the existing stack (e.g., AST RAG, FastAPI, Next.js).

## 🔮 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📝 Additional context

Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
